mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_login_log ( user_id, username, real_name, login_type, login_ip, login_location, user_agent, browser, os, login_status, fail_reason, login_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{username}, #{realName}, #{loginType}, #{loginIp}, #{loginLocation}, #{userAgent}, #{browser}, #{os}, #{loginStatus}, #{failReason}, NOW() )
